title: US Stocks
subtitle: Pre-market signal radar
description: A compact pre-market signal board for AI infrastructure stocks, with data quality notes and source links.
descriptionZh: 面向 AI 基建股票的盘前信号看板，包含数据质量标注和来源链接。

setupFields.label: Signal mode

options.label: Pre-market
options.description: Rank AI infrastructure stocks before the US market opens.

setupFields.hint: The MVP focuses on a pre-market trading signal radar.
setupFields.hintZh: MVP 聚焦盘前交易信号雷达。

setupFields.label: Max signals
setupFields.hint: The extension fetches the full configured universe, then renders the top ranked signals.
setupFields.hintZh: 扩展会抓取完整股票池，然后只展示排名靠前的信号。

setupFields.label: Max fetched symbols
setupFields.hint: Limits live data requests before ranking. Set higher after you confirm provider coverage.
setupFields.hintZh: 限制排序前的实时数据请求数量。确认数据源覆盖稳定后可以调高。

setupFields.label: Sector rows
setupFields.hint: Show a compact sector tape above the stock table.
setupFields.hintZh: 在股票表格上方展示紧凑的板块概览。

setupFields.label: LLM signal summaries
setupFields.hint: How many ranked stock rows receive LLM-written drivers and invalidation notes.
setupFields.hintZh: 排名靠前的多少个股票信号会交给 LLM 生成驱动因素和失效条件。

setupFields.label: Include neutral watches
setupFields.hint: Include neutral stocks when they have notable news or data movement.
setupFields.hintZh: 当中性股票有明显新闻或数据变化时，也纳入看板。

setupFields.label: Skip LLM synthesis
setupFields.hint: Leave off to let the configured LLM refine summaries, drivers, invalidation, and risk flags.
setupFields.hintZh: 关闭此项时，会使用配置的 LLM 优化摘要、驱动因素、失效条件和风险提示。
